title: WeaponWheel
description: A tactical RDR2-inspired weapon wheel that keeps your arsenal organized in a static layout with intelligent off-hand management for shields and arrows. It features automatic inventory cleanup when switching weapons and a dedicated slot to clear your hands
body:
Static Slots: Items stay in their assigned categories (Sword, Axe, Bow, etc.) regardless of their position in your inventory.

Off-hand Logic: Selecting a shield or arrows automatically places them in your off-hand for immediate use.

Smart Cleanup: Arrows are automatically moved from your off-hand back to your backpack when you switch to a melee weapon.

Center Display: Real-time durability percentages and stack counts are displayed right in the middle of the wheel.

Fists Slot: A dedicated "Fists" option to quickly put away your active items and clear your hands.
